chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitution Petition No.D-4597 of 2024 (Mst. Rabia Ahsan v. The Government of Sindh and others) Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For hearing of Misc. No.20378 /2024 2. For order on office objection No.03 & 04 3. For hearing of Misc. No.20379 /2024 4. For hearing of main case 23.09.2024. Mr. Muhammad Sabar, Advocate for the petitioner.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency granted. 2-4. The petitioner by way of the instant petition has sought punishment to the private respondents with direction to them that they may not lodge any FIR against her; additionally, a direction has also been sought against Muhammad Ali Saqib a police constable from visiting her house and issuing threats to her, her husband and in-laws. Heard arguments. Perused the record. No punishment could be awarded to anyone without charge or trial that too by this Court in the exercise of its constitutional jurisdiction. The registration of FIR is a legal course which could hardly be prevented that too without lawful justification. None could be restrained from visiting the house of the petitioner under the deception of the threats. The petition as formulated appears to be incompetent and misconceived, therefore, it is dismissed in limine. J U D G E J U D G E Nadir /PA
